post_shadow_delta_review.note: First fix commit in the run that introduced no new false claim. Mutation-checked the new key-set test (RED under an identically-broken triple).

fix_decisions.note: efficiency-trace event list missing state_dir_chmod_failed (loop's own coupled-site miss)
_CodedError lifetime-immutability claim made TRUE via __setattr__ seal; exception protocols verified intact
module docstring: DEVFLOW_FLIGHT_NOW does not drive wait's poll deadline
owner-token lifetime across tool calls documented at both skill call sites
argparse usage-error remap tests + identical-key-set assertion

fix_decisions.claim_text: the flight domain object is a bare untyped dict mutated in place across ~10 functions rather than through a small typed API
fix_decisions.evidence: type-design-analyzer graded it advisory itself ('flagged for awareness rather than as a bug'); every write site independently gates on current state and _read_flight re-validates state on every read. A typed-API refactor is a design change beyond this issue's ACs.

parking_evidence.basis: single-source advisory the producing agent itself declined to grade as a defect

fix_decisions.claim_text: --evidence defaults to a fixed low-information string; consider requiring concrete evidence (PID/host)
fix_decisions.evidence: Graded Suggestion/style by its own producer. The field is logical owner evidence, not a forensic record, and the AC only requires that it be recorded.

parking_evidence.basis: style suggestion with no behavioral fail-direction

fix_decisions.claim_text: the default invocation path (no --state-dir override) is untested
fix_decisions.evidence: Testing the default path means writing into the repo's real .devflow/tmp/verification-flights/ during the suite, which the suite otherwise never does; doing it safely needs a cwd-isolation fixture. Every behavior is covered through the explicit --state-dir path.

parking_evidence.basis: covering it needs a test-isolation fixture this PR does not introduce

verification_evidence.note: 0 failed, 0 skipped on the committed tree — the #434 stale-prose self-scan ran rather than self-skipping

reflections: The engine_self_modifying EARLY shadow trigger (after iteration 1) was not run; only the convergence-time shadow ran. That early audit would likely have surfaced the four documented falsehoods sooner and saved iterations 2-4. Recorded as a real coverage deviation, not a clean pass.

Documented-falsehood recurrence is this run's dominant defect class: five of six fix commits introduced at least one fresh false claim while correcting older ones. The blinded shadow, not the iterating loop, is what caught the last four.
Two of the shadow's findings were coupled-site misses created by the loop itself (a telemetry event added without updating its doc list; an immutability claim stronger than the code enforced).
